candidates.name: Bánh tằm cà ri
candidates.desc: Spicy chicken curry over special rice noodles

candidates.name: Bún bung
candidates.desc: Rice vermicelli cooked with pork ribs and "dọc mùng"

candidates.name: Chạo tôm
candidates.desc: Barbecued shrimp paste/mousse on a sugar cane stick

candidates.name: Bún mọc
candidates.desc: Rice vermicelli with sprouted broth

candidates.name: Bún măng vịt
candidates.desc: Bamboo shoots and duck noodle soup. [ 3 ]

candidates.name: Bún ốc
candidates.desc: Noodles with snails

candidates.name: Bún thang
candidates.desc: Rice vermicelli served with broth and various other ingredients – laksa leaves, Chinese coriander, thin fried chicken eggs, shredded chicken breast, and thinly sliced pork rolls

candidates.name: Cellophane noodles miến , bún tàu , bún tào
candidates.desc: Transparent noodle made from starch and water, generally sold in dried form, soaked to reconstitute, then used in soups, stir-fried dishes, or spring rolls.

candidates.name: Mì or Súp mì
candidates.desc: Vietnamese/Chinese noodle soup with yellow wheat noodles brought over by Chinese immigrants.

candidates.name: Miến lươn
candidates.desc: Northern Vietnam , North Central Coast ( Nghệ An )

candidates.name: Miến trộn
candidates.desc: Stir-fried rice vermicelli mixed with shrimp or crab, seasoned with sweet and spicy spices

candidates.name: Rice vermicelli bún
candidates.desc: A type of rice noodles

candidates.name: Bánh cam
candidates.desc: Deep-fried glutinous rice sesame balls filled with sweetened mung bean paste; from southern Vietnam

candidates.name: Bánh khúc
candidates.desc: Glutinous rice ball filled with mung bean and fatty pork

candidates.name: Bánh phu thê
candidates.desc: Literally "husband and wife cake"; a sweet cake made of rice or tapioca flour and gelatin, filled with mung bean paste; also spelled bánh xu xê (su sê)

candidates.name: Bánh phu thê bột bán
candidates.desc: Husband and wife cakes made with tapioca pearls

candidates.name: Bánh rán
candidates.desc: Deep-fried glutinous rice sesame balls filled with sweetened mung bean paste; from northern Vietnam [ 2 ] [ 7 ]

candidates.name: Bánh tẻ
candidates.desc: Small steamed rice cake wrapped with leaves of some local trees into a long, thin cylindrical shape, and boiled thoroughly.

candidates.name: Bánh đúc
candidates.desc: Rice cake or corn cake eaten as a dessert or savory meal

candidates.name: Bánh rế
candidates.desc: Bình Thuận Province

candidates.name: Bánh cống
candidates.desc: Minced pork mixed with tapioca root and whole green beans, served with a circled shrimp on top.

candidates.name: Bánh quai vạc
candidates.desc: Made from tapioca starch, filled with shrimp and meat inside.

candidates.name: Bánh tai
candidates.desc: Made from plain rice flour, pork and some other spices.

candidates.name: Bánh tai heo
candidates.desc: Made from flour, granulated sugar, white sesame, condensed milk, eggs, butter, vanilla, cooking oil, salt, water... and processed by deep frying.

candidates.name: Bánh tôm
candidates.desc: Shrimp patties [ 2 ]

candidates.name: Bánh tôm Hồ Tây
candidates.desc: A shrimp patty specialty originating from the area around West Lake ( Tây Hồ ), Hanoi

candidates.name: Chả giò or Nem rán
candidates.desc: Fried pork spring rolls

candidates.name: Gỏi cá trích
candidates.desc: Raw herring salad

candidates.name: Món cuốn
candidates.desc: Roll which includes a variety of ingredients rolled in rice paper (bánh tráng)

candidates.name: Cơm nắm
candidates.desc: Northern Vietnam

candidates.name: Cơm rượu
candidates.desc: Dessert from Southern Vietnam, made from glutinous rice

candidates.name: Cơm cháy
candidates.desc: Crispy golden brown rice at the bottom of the cooking pot – which is then left dried in natural sunlight for 2–3 days

candidates.name: Cơm gà Quảng Nam
candidates.desc: Cooked rice served with boiled chicken and sprinkled with chicken broth

candidates.name: Cơm lam
candidates.desc: Glutinous rice and other ingredients placed in bamboo tubes and cooked on fire

candidates.name: Oản
candidates.desc: White sticky rice, granulated sugar or cake flour formed into a truncated pyramid shape – used as an offering in Buddhist temples.

candidates.name: Bird's nest soup súp yến sào
candidates.desc: Bird's nest soup

candidates.name: Canh chua
candidates.desc: Hot and sour soup

candidates.name: Canh khoai mỡ
candidates.desc: Purple yam soup

candidates.name: Khổ qua nhồi thịt
candidates.desc: Bitter gourd stuffed with meat, then bundled with scallions and cooked in bone broth

candidates.name: Ốc nấu chuối đậu
candidates.desc: A rustic but quite sophisticated dish that consists of boiled snails cooked with green bananas, fried beans, bacon, adorned with guise leaves and perilla

candidates.name: Congee cháo
candidates.desc: Rice porridge

candidates.name: Súp măng cua
candidates.desc: Asparagus-crab combination soup

candidates.name: Bò kho
candidates.desc: Beef and vegetable stew [ 1 ]

candidates.name: Bánh chưng
candidates.desc: Square-shaped steamed glutinous rice dumpling wrapped in a Phrynium placentarium leaf ( lá dong ) [ 2 ] The dish is a traditionally served around Vietnamese New Year to be eaten with pickled leeks

candidates.name: Bánh giầy
candidates.desc: White, flat, and round glutinous rice cake, wrapped in cut pieces of banana leaves, and usually served with a type of Vietnamese sausage chả lụa

candidates.name: Bánh đa nướng
candidates.desc: Called Bánh tráng nướng in the South, large round flat rice crackers

candidates.name: Bánh gối
candidates.desc: Deep fried pastry stuffed with cellophane noodles , minced pork, cloud ear fungus and thin slices of chinese sausage [ 7 ]

candidates.name: Bánh lá
candidates.desc: Parcel of a variety of rice stuffed with some fillings and wrapped in a leaf or leaves.

candidates.name: Black pudding dồi tiết' (Northern) or dồi huyết (Southern)
candidates.desc: Blood sausage

candidates.name: Bò 7 món
candidates.desc: 7 courses of beef

candidates.name: Giò lụa
candidates.desc: A pork sausage, similar to Bologna sausage

candidates.name: Lò trấu
candidates.desc: Fixed Rice Husk Stove

candidates.name: Ô mai
candidates.desc: Snack made from salted dried apricot or sugared dried apricot

candidates.name: Ốc bươu nhồi thịt
candidates.desc: Minced snail mixed with ground pork, carrot, black mushroom stuffed in snail shell

candidates.name: Rousong chà bông
candidates.desc: Meat floss

candidates.name: Bò nướng lá lốt
candidates.desc: Ground beef wrapped in lolot (NEVER grape leaves)

candidates.name: Tiết canh
candidates.desc: Fresh animal blood mixed with fish sauce/ light salted water – used with chopped meat and animal cartilage

candidates.name: You tiao quẩy
candidates.desc: A long, golden-brown, deep fried strip of dough

candidates.name: Bánh rế
candidates.desc: Bánh rế is a Vietnamese street food made from sweet potatoes. The sweet potato is made into a pancake, deep-fried, then sugared.

candidates.name: Bánh cáy
candidates.desc: Rectangular-shaped sweet dessert made by roasting and grinding glutinous rice and other ingredients

candidates.name: Bánh da lợn
candidates.desc: Colored steamed layer cake made from tapioca starch, rice flour, coconut milk, water, sugar, and other ingredients

candidates.name: Bánh chuối
candidates.desc: Banana cake [ 7 ]

candidates.name: Bánh cốm
candidates.desc: Made from cốm , green bean paste, grated coconut and pumpkin jam or naked lotus jam. Often used for engagement ceremonies

candidates.name: Bánh đậu xanh
candidates.desc: Made from ground mung bean paste with sugar and vegetable oil or animal fat

candidates.name: Bánh gai
candidates.desc: The crust is made up of glutinous rice flour and hemp leaves; the filling is of finely chopped lard, banana essential oil, coconut rice, and cooked green beans

candidates.name: Bánh tro
candidates.desc: Leaves are burned into ashes and then soaked with glutinous rice to create a golden brown color like amber. Served with sugar or honey/ molasses.

candidates.name: Bánh in
candidates.desc: A Vietnamese cake from the Huế, often sold in small rectangular shaped snack packs. The main ingredients include mung bean, rice flour and durian

candidates.name: Bánh kẹp lá dứa
candidates.desc: Pandan and coconut flavored waffle eaten plain

candidates.name: Bánh khảo
candidates.desc: Glutinous flour roasted with sugar, filled with pumpkin jam and fat

candidates.name: Bánh lọt
candidates.desc: Made from rice flour and tapioca starch with the aroma of coconut milk, sugar, and the green and white color of pandan leaves

candidates.name: Bánh mật
candidates.desc: Made from glutinous rice flour mixed with mung bean molasses, and wrapped in banana leaves

candidates.name: Bánh nhãn
candidates.desc: Made from fragrant glutinous rice or Hai Hau yellow sticky rice, chicken eggs, white sugar and lard

candidates.name: Bánh pía
candidates.desc: Teochew-style with durian

candidates.name: Bánh tét
candidates.desc: Log-shaped cylindrical glutinous rice cake, wrapped in a banana leaf and filled with a meat or vegetarian filling

candidates.name: Bánh tiêu
candidates.desc: Hollow doughnuts

candidates.name: Bánh trung thu
candidates.desc: Mooncake [ 2 ]

candidates.name: Chuối chiên
candidates.desc: Banana fried in a batter

candidates.name: Coconut candy kẹo dừa
candidates.desc: Candy made with coconut milk and coconut cream

candidates.name: Grass jelly thạch sương sáo
candidates.desc: Made by boiling the aged and slightly oxidized stalks and leaves of Mesona chinensis (member of the mint family) with potassium carbonate for several hours with a little starch and then cooling the liquid to a jelly-like consistency

candidates.name: Mè xửng Huế
candidates.desc: A chewy candy originally from the city of Huế, made with boiled down cane sugar, (into a soft and thick solid), coated with sesame seeds, and usually containing peanuts.

candidates.name: Bánh trôi
candidates.desc: Boiled Glutinous rice balls – also called bánh chay; literally "floating cake") – served together with bánh chay [ 12 ]

candidates.name: Thạch rau câu or sương sa
candidates.desc: Gelatin dessert

candidates.name: Rượu nếp
candidates.desc: Sweet dessert made from black glutinous rice.

candidates.name: Sâm bổ lượng
candidates.desc: Sweet, cold soup

candidates.name: Fish sauce nước mắm
candidates.desc: A base condiment that is derived from fish that have been allowed to ferment. It is normally used as seasoning during cooking or a base for sauces with other ingredients and is not to be used by itself.

candidates.name: Hoisin sauce tương đen
candidates.desc: A popular condiment for phở in Ho Chi Minh City

candidates.name: Muối ớt rau răm
candidates.desc: Dipping sauce made with Vietnamese coriander , bird's eye chilis , lime, and other ingredients. Used as a dipping sauce for meats or trứng vịt lộn .

candidates.name: Muối ớt xanh
candidates.desc: Dipping sauce with green bird's eye chilis and kaffir lime leaves as main ingredients. Usually served with seafood.

candidates.name: Nước chấm
candidates.desc: Dipping sauce with fish sauce, water, sugar, lime and sometimes chilis and ginger.

candidates.name: Sa tế
candidates.desc: Chợ Lớn, Ho Chi Minh City , Southern Vietnam

candidates.name: Shrimp paste mắm tôm
candidates.desc: Shrimp paste

candidates.name: Soy sauce xì dầu or nước tương
candidates.desc: Condiment produced from fermented soybeans

candidates.name: Tương
candidates.desc: Condiments made from fermented bean paste

candidates.name: Tương ớt
candidates.desc: Hot/chili sauce that varies in different regions.

candidates.name: Bia hơi
candidates.desc: Fresh beer

candidates.name: Chanh muối
candidates.desc: Salty limeade [ 12 ]

candidates.name: Nước sắn dây hoa bưởi
candidates.desc: Made of kudzu and pomelo flower extract.

candidates.name: Rau má
candidates.desc: Iced pennywort juice often sweetened

candidates.name: Rượu cần
candidates.desc: Tây Nguyên and Tây Bắc

candidates.name: Rượu đế
candidates.desc: Mekong Delta

candidates.name: Rượu thuốc
candidates.desc: Medicinal liquor

candidates.name: Snake wine rượu rắn
candidates.desc: An alcoholic beverage produced by infusing whole snakes in rice wine or grain alcohol

candidates.name: Egg soda soda sữa hột gà
candidates.desc: Iced soda with egg, sugar and milk

candidates.name: Soy milk sữa đậu nành
candidates.desc: Beverage made from soybeans

candidates.name: Vietnamese tea trà Việt
candidates.desc: Green tea , similar to Keemun and Yunnan , but more sweet

candidates.name: Vietnamese wine
candidates.desc: Wine produced in Vietnam
